assertionResults.fullName: advanceWorkflow — transition integrity & role enforcement valid transition: matching role + valid edge → returns in_progress
assertionResults.title: valid transition: matching role + valid edge → returns in_progress

assertionResults.fullName: advanceWorkflow — transition integrity & role enforcement throws WorkflowClosedError when instance status is "approved"
assertionResults.title: throws WorkflowClosedError when instance status is "approved"

assertionResults.fullName: advanceWorkflow — transition integrity & role enforcement throws WorkflowClosedError when instance status is "rejected"
assertionResults.title: throws WorkflowClosedError when instance status is "rejected"

assertionResults.fullName: advanceWorkflow — transition integrity & role enforcement throws WorkflowClosedError when instance status is "cancelled"
assertionResults.title: throws WorkflowClosedError when instance status is "cancelled"

assertionResults.fullName: advanceWorkflow — transition integrity & role enforcement throws InvalidTransitionError when no edge exists for action
assertionResults.title: throws InvalidTransitionError when no edge exists for action

assertionResults.fullName: advanceWorkflow — transition integrity & role enforcement sequence integrity (no backward jumps) throws InvalidTransitionError when to_step_order equals from_step_order (circular)
assertionResults.title: throws InvalidTransitionError when to_step_order equals from_step_order (circular)

assertionResults.fullName: advanceWorkflow — transition integrity & role enforcement sequence integrity (no backward jumps) throws InvalidTransitionError when to_step_order is less than from_step_order (backward jump)
assertionResults.title: throws InvalidTransitionError when to_step_order is less than from_step_order (backward jump)

assertionResults.fullName: advanceWorkflow — transition integrity & role enforcement sequence integrity (no backward jumps) allows forward skip (e.g. reject bypasses approval to terminal)
assertionResults.title: allows forward skip (e.g. reject bypasses approval to terminal)

assertionResults.fullName: advanceWorkflow — transition integrity & role enforcement throws UnauthorizedTransitionError when actor role does not match step role
assertionResults.title: throws UnauthorizedTransitionError when actor role does not match step role

assertionResults.fullName: advanceWorkflow — transition integrity & role enforcement wrong-role error message identifies the bad actor role
assertionResults.title: wrong-role error message identifies the bad actor role

assertionResults.fullName: advanceWorkflow — transition integrity & role enforcement SLA timestamp recording sets end_time on the closed step
assertionResults.title: sets end_time on the closed step

assertionResults.fullName: advanceWorkflow — transition integrity & role enforcement SLA timestamp recording sets start_time on the newly opened step
assertionResults.title: sets start_time on the newly opened step

assertionResults.fullName: advanceWorkflow — transition integrity & role enforcement SLA timestamp recording sets end_time even on a terminal transition (no next step)
assertionResults.title: sets end_time even on a terminal transition (no next step)

assertionResults.fullName: advanceWorkflow — transition integrity & role enforcement terminal transition: sets completed_at on instance and returns approved
assertionResults.title: terminal transition: sets completed_at on instance and returns approved

assertionResults.fullName: advanceWorkflow — transition integrity & role enforcement skips role check when actorRole is omitted (default null)
assertionResults.title: skips role check when actorRole is omitted (default null)

assertionResults.fullName: advanceWorkflow — transition integrity & role enforcement skips role check when actorRole is null explicitly
assertionResults.title: skips role check when actorRole is null explicitly

assertionResults.fullName: advanceWorkflow — transition integrity & role enforcement rolls back transaction on DB error inside transaction
assertionResults.title: rolls back transaction on DB error inside transaction
